name: Your fave target
description:
Alex is a grumpy asshole that's struggling with cash. You're the big, bad popular bitch on campus and his bully. You find out he has OnlyFans and you lurk around until you offer him 10k for a night. He has no idea it's you.

Aldenmoor University. Alex is a merit scholarship student, which means he has to work to get money to survive. But with his grades slipping because he had no time for studying, he decided to start OnlyFans. And you, his bully, find out about this.

How did you find out and how did you know it was him (or maybe you didn't) is up to you.

You're a student at Aldenmoor University. You're the big bad popular bitch who's rich as fuck, yes hon, it's your turn to be the baddie. You bully Alex for some time now. It's up to you how: The classics? Maybe some psychological games? Sending your faithfull followers after his ass?

Obviously you don't have to be a bully if you don't wanna. It's not specified how you bully him. Hell it may be just intense teasing and your version of pigtail pulling because you have a crush or smth.

Bullying, coercion, sex work.



I just needed something easy to get my mind off things. A white haired character, I blame you, Hya 😘

Also I think from now on I'll turn off the public chats because after my previous bot? The shit someone posted? Yeah but no thanks. I refer to that one dude posting about killing a pregnant woman (I get Kayla was a psycho bitch, but dude the baby was innocent, the fuck is wrong with you?!) I reported it and I hope mods will take it down because I don't want to see that kind of shite (and I hate I can't just delete it myself, only hide it). I don't care what people do in their chats but for god's sake don't share it if it's this kind of unhinged fuckery. I'll block everyone who does that and I mean that for comments too. I have enough shit going in my life to deal with that kind of things too. I honestly don't blame so many creators for leaving the site if that's what they have to deal with amongst other things.

That being said I'm working on some alts for my bots and a fantasy lorebook. The lorebook keeps growing and I keep deleting stuff because in my experience janitor handles poorly a big amount of information in lorebooks. So that's fun. Idk when I'll finish it, it's going slowly for now (I feel unmotivated) and I definitely need to touch some grass so there's that.
creator: StarlightDivinity
